prompt: Pin all GitHub Actions in my workflows to commit SHAs.
expected_output: Scans all workflow files, resolves latest release SHAs for each action, and replaces tag references with pinned SHAs and version comments
assertions: finds all workflow files in .github/workflows/
extracts all uses: references from each workflow
resolves the latest release tag (exact version, not major tag) for each action
resolves the commit SHA for each release tag, dereferencing annotated tags
replaces tag references with SHA and adds a version comment (e.g., # v4.2.2)
presents changes to the user before applying

prompt: Update my GitHub Actions to use pinned versions. I'm currently on actions/checkout@v3.
expected_output: Detects that v3 is not the latest major version, flags the jump, and asks the user before upgrading
assertions: detects the major version jump from v3 to the latest major version
warns the user about the breaking change risk
asks the user whether to upgrade or stay on the current major
if staying on current major, resolves the latest patch of that major version
does not silently upgrade to the new major version

prompt: Set up Dependabot to keep my GitHub Actions dependencies up to date.
expected_output: Creates or updates dependabot.yml with github-actions ecosystem and grouped updates, and scans for additional ecosystems
assertions: checks for an existing dependabot.yml file
adds the github-actions ecosystem with grouped updates
scans the repository for other dependency files (package.json, go.mod, .gitmodules, etc.)
adds discovered ecosystems to the dependabot configuration
groups all ecosystem updates using patterns: ['*']

prompt: I already have a dependabot.yml for npm. Add GitHub Actions pinning and dependabot support.
expected_output: Preserves existing npm configuration and adds github-actions ecosystem without duplicating entries
assertions: reads the existing dependabot.yml
preserves the existing npm ecosystem entry and its configuration
adds the github-actions ecosystem entry if missing
does not duplicate any existing ecosystem entries
adds groups configuration to entries that lack it

prompt: Check if my GitHub Actions are properly pinned to SHAs.
expected_output: Identifies which actions are already pinned and which still use tags, and reports the current state
assertions: scans all workflow files for uses: references
distinguishes between SHA-pinned and tag-based references
presents a summary table showing pinned status for each action
skips actions that are already properly pinned

prompt: Can you pin my Docker base images in the Dockerfile to specific digests for security?
expected_output: Clarifies that this skill handles GitHub Actions only, and Docker image pinning is out of scope
assertions: clarifies the skill focuses on GitHub Actions workflow files, not Dockerfiles
does not attempt to pin Docker image digests in Dockerfiles
may suggest checking Dependabot or a Docker-specific tool for Dockerfile pinning
offers to help with any GitHub Actions pinning instead

prompt: Make my GitHub Actions workflows more secure.
expected_output: Interprets the request as a prompt to pin actions to SHAs and set up Dependabot, then confirms the plan with the user before proceeding
assertions: interprets the request as a supply-chain security improvement
proposes pinning all action references to commit SHAs
proposes configuring Dependabot with github-actions ecosystem
confirms the plan with the user before making any changes
does not silently apply all changes without user approval

prompt: Pin all my GitHub Actions. Here is my workflow: uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2 and uses: actions/setup-node@1a4442cacd436585916f1602891dd6f2de9e3bec # v5.0.0
expected_output: Detects all actions are already SHA-pinned and asks the user before checking for updates
assertions: identifies that all action references are already SHA-pinned with version comments
presents the current state table showing pinned status
asks the user whether they want to check for available updates
does not make API calls to resolve versions without user confirmation
if user declines, skips resolution and proceeds to Dependabot configuration
